page: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-32-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system operates at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz and includes a substantial 504 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 248 GB of RAM, providing 7.75 GB of memory per core, and bundles 1745 GB of local NVMe SSD storage distributed across five drives.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong single-core performance, with Geekbench single-core and single-threaded compression tasks reaching top-tier status in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-core performance and memory bandwidth generally fall into the strong to average categories. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets, including Advanced Vector Extensions and Advanced Matrix Extensions, which contribute to strong prompt processing speeds in large language model inference and top-tier text generation speeds for smaller models.

This instance offers high resource density by combining a high memory-to-vCPU ratio with fast local NVMe storage, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring rapid data access without the overhead of external storage. It is appropriate for memory-intensive databases, text and image processing pipelines, static web serving, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-32-lssd is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 248 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor. It includes 1745 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across five drives, offering high data density for storage-intensive applications. Operating at 2.3 GHz with a 504 MB L3 cache, the instance delivers top-tier single-core performance, particularly in compression and text processing benchmarks. Its CPU architecture supports Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512, enabling strong performance in LLM inference and cryptographic operations. This hardware profile makes the instance appropriate for memory-intensive databases, data processing pipelines, and web serving workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-32-lssd is a memory-optimized server with 32 vCPUs, 248 GB RAM, and 1745 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier single-core and text processing performance.

tagline: High-density memory and local NVMe storage paired with advanced matrix extensions for demanding database and data processing workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6985P-C processors with 504 MB L3 cache.
248 GB of RAM providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.75 GB per core.
1745 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage across five bundled drives.
Top-tier single-core execution and compression performance in benchmark testing.
Hardware-accelerated AMX and AVX-512 instructions for efficient CPU-based inference.
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, web serving, and data processing pipelines.
